name: Retro Highway
author: Poki
description: Retro Highway is a motorcycle stunt game with an old-school pixel art style! Each run you have to try and get as far as possible, all while taking on daring and dangerous Stunt Challenges. Doing tricks and stunts earns you money and gives you access to more locations; such as the mountains, the desert and even the moon! Besides the different locations, there are lots of new bikes to unlock; each with its own unique style. So what are you waiting for? Time to hit the road! How to play Retro Highway? Use W and D or the left and right arrow keys to steer! Hold spacebar to activate the nitro boost! Who created Retro Highway? Retro Highway is created by Gearhead Studios. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Retro Highway for free? You can play Retro Highway for free on Poki. Can I play Retro Highway on mobile devices and desktop? Retro Highway can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
